generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. Remember when [Allied Country] cut their defense budget by 20% last year? We can't keep carrying them while they prioritize domestic spending. My cousin's in the military - he says the burden is clearly uneven. We need to make sure our commitments are reciprocal or we're just setting ourselves up for trouble. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
